tldr: INEOS Grenadiers took the 23.5 km TTT by two seconds over Lidl-Trek, with Decathlon, Visma and Red Bull-Bora rounding out the top five. A textbook flat TTT setting up the climbing days that would settle GC.

narrative.headline: INEOS by two seconds
narrative.body: 23.5 km flat TTT from Cosne-Cours-sur-Loire to Pouilly-sur-Loire. INEOS the last to start and took the win by two seconds over Lidl-Trek. Visma fourth at +0:15 — Vingegaard well placed for the climbing days.

gcImpact.headline: GC reshapes around teams
gcImpact.body: INEOS into the leader's jersey; Vingegaard now within climbing-stage range of every rival.
